full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: give me some papers for my exam. need core a* between 2009-2012 about arima, gmm or svm.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Gave me a list of papers that meet the exam constraints.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I checked the MidSem_PartA.pdf and confirmed these are the right categories.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: is the logical shapelets paper already taken by someone else in the sheet?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Informed me that Subham Mahapatra already chose this paper.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Checked the response sheet and confirmed it was taken. Discarded this choice.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: is the fastfood paper from 2009 to 2012? i need to be sure about the year.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Found out the paper is from 2013, which is too late for the rules.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Verified on the conference website that it is from 2013. Discarded.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: is the suboptimal solution path paper too hard? i dont want to do too much math on my laptop.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Suggested it might be too complex for a standard CPU and hard to explain.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Looked at the math in the paper and decided to avoid it.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Check if final choice is taken
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: is anyone doing the advice refinement paper yet? check the sheet for me.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Confirmed no one else has submitted this paper yet.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Searched the live sheet and found no matches for this paper.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: is advice refinement in a core a* venue? also tell me if it is 2010 or 2011.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Confirmed it is NIPS 2011, which is a CORE A* venue.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: can i run this advice svm on my laptop? i dont have any gpu.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Confirmed it is CPU-friendly and suitable for a laptop.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Checked the paper's experiments and they used simple hardware.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: what does advice mean here? how does it help the svm margin?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Explained that advice acts as constraints to improve the SVM margin.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Read the method section and confirmed it uses prior knowledge as constraints.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: are the uci datasets in this paper free to download? i need public data.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Confirmed the datasets are public and available on the UCI repository.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Downloaded the datasets from the UCI website myself.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: what happens if the advice is wrong? will the svm fail?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Explained the refinement process that handles noisy or incorrect advice.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Checked the results section to see performance with bad advice.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: can i use sklearn for this or do i need to write my own code?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Suggested that I would need custom code for the specific refinement constraints.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Found a library for quadratic programming that I can use in Python.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: is the inference same as regular svm or does it change because of the advice?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Confirmed that once trained, the inference is a standard SVM prediction.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Verified the decision function math in the paper.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: is this a methodological paper? i dont want a dataset paper.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Confirmed the primary contribution is a new method for refining advice.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Confirmed by reading the contribution summary in the introduction.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: write a simple reason why i chose this paper for my form.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Provided a short and simple summary for my submission.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Simplified the text even more to match my own style.

top_5_prompts.prompt: give me some papers for my exam. need core a* between 2009-2012 about arima, gmm or svm.

top_5_prompts.why_important: Helped me understand the most important failure mode for my chosen method.
